headline: Here's Why You Should Retain ABM Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: ABM Industries' record sales, ELEVATE strategy and AI infrastructure investments drive growth, but rising costs and economic risks curb momentum.

headline: Veralto Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO), a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions dedicated to Safeguarding the World's Most Vital Resources™, announced that it will webcast its second quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, beginning at 7:30 a.m. ET.
